Descryption: Ensure that external accounts (on tent level) not used in last '30' days are disabled
Result: 0 guest accounts show no sign-in activity in the last 30 days
Expected_Value: CSV or API proof of the said accounts being disabled
Recommencdation:
Review all external accounts with a last sign-in date greater than 30 days ago (or greater based on business requirements) and block sign-in to the account or delete it from your Microsoft Entra ID Tent. Due to fact that there may be different situations and business needs, the governce of lifecycle of external identities (e.g. Consultants) should be automated as best effort (e.g. creating automating scripts that will block unused accounts greater than 30 days)

The recommendation is a part of Control ID: AAD.IM.02
